name: io.github.klein-business/legal-text-mcp-de
description: German federal & state legal texts (BGB, DSGVO, …) with canonical IDs and cite-grade provenance.

environmentVariables.name: DATASET_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to a normalised corpus directory or a corpus archive (legal-texts-de-*.tar.zst). Defaults to the bundled fixture; production deployments should mount /data/corpus/latest.tar.zst.

environmentVariables.name: STRICT_DATASET
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to refuse to start if the dataset cannot be loaded (recommended for hosted deployments).

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Required only for the smart `research_topic` tool which uses LLM-assisted synthesis. Without it, the tool degrades gracefully to a ranked-search fallback.

environmentVariables.name: DATASET_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Mount path inside the container for the legal-text corpus.

environmentVariables.name: STRICT_DATASET
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to refuse to start if the dataset cannot be loaded.
